name: catch
description: Player catches falling/incoming objects to score; missed objects penalise.

name: dodge
description: Player avoids incoming threats while moving toward a goal.

name: rhythm
description: Player times button presses to incoming visual or audio beats.

name: matching
description: Player pairs or aligns objects by colour/shape/sound.

name: stacking
description: Player drops blocks/objects to build the tallest stable structure.

name: tracing
description: Player follows a path on screen without crossing boundaries.

name: memorize
description: Player observes a sequence then repeats it from memory.

name: herding
description: Player guides multiple semi-autonomous entities into a goal zone.

name: balancing
description: Player keeps a wobbling object/character centred as conditions change.

name: sorting
description: Player categorises incoming objects into correct bins before they pile up.
